chunks.title: Call to Consecrate Priests and Garments
chunks.reason: God commands Moses to bring Aaron and his sons and instructs the making of holy garments using specific materials.

chunks.title: Construction of the Ephod
chunks.reason: Detailed instructions for crafting the ephod, including shoulder stones with engraved names of Israel's sons.

chunks.title: Construction of the Breastpiece of Judgment
chunks.reason: Specifications for the breastpiece with twelve stones representing tribes, including Urim and Thummim.

chunks.title: The Robe of the Ephod
chunks.reason: Description of the blue robe with pomegranates and bells to ensure the priest's life while ministering.

chunks.title: The Gold Plate of the Turban
chunks.reason: Instructions for the gold plate engraved with 'Holy to Yahweh' to bear the iniquity of holy gifts.

chunks.title: Garments for Aaron's Sons and Final Consecration
chunks.reason: Commands to make tunics, sashes, and caps for the sons, undergarments, and the final ordination ritual.
